prompt: A loading robot stacks containers while a drone monitors alignment. The drone starts inspection after every 5 containers are stacked. If container tilt exceeds 3 degrees, stacking stops immediately.
constraints: MonitorDrone inspects after every 5 containers stacked
LoaderBot stops stacking when tilt exceeds 3 degrees

results.constraint: MonitorDrone inspects after every 5 containers stacked

The '-->' operator is appropriate here as it enforces that after every 5 containers are stacked by LoaderBot, the MonitorDrone will monitor, following the 'after every' cue.",
